tests.scenario: Close a donation prompt and still start the session
steps: Open the app from a fresh install or while signed out
Pick a session that brings up a donation prompt
Close the prompt using the dismiss or 'Not now' option
tests.expected_result: The prompt closes, and the same session is still available to start without payment or account creation.

tests.scenario: Close a donation prompt while browsing
steps: Open the home screen and start browsing normally
Bring up a donation prompt from one of the browsing surfaces
Close the prompt
tests.expected_result: The user stays in the same browsing flow, and playback is still available.

tests.scenario: Browse the app without seeing ads
steps: Open the home screen
Spend about 15 minutes moving between the home screen, course list, and one course page
Watch the interface while browsing
tests.expected_result: No display, video, or audio ad appears while browsing.

tests.scenario: Finish a session without ad interruptions
steps: Start any guided meditation session
Let the session play all the way through
Watch the player during playback and after the session ends
tests.expected_result: No third-party ad appears before, during, or after the session.

tests.scenario: Open the browse area for emotional needs
steps: Open the app's browse or discovery area
Go to the section organized by needs or emotional states
Look at the category labels shown there
tests.expected_result: Anxiety, Stress, Panic, Grief, Anger, and Sleep are all visible as separate categories.

tests.scenario: Open one needs-based category
steps: Open the needs-based browse area
Select the Anxiety category
Review the page that opens
tests.expected_result: A list of sessions for anxiety support is displayed.

tests.scenario: Save a session as a favorite
steps: Open any session detail page or player screen
Use the favorite control to save that session
Return to the home screen
tests.expected_result: The selected session is saved as a favorite and is available from the home screen.

tests.scenario: Start a favorite quickly from home
steps: Make sure there is at least one saved favorite
Open the home screen
Start that favorite using the controls shown there
tests.expected_result: The favorite session starts in no more than two taps from the home screen.

tests.scenario: Show the beginner course in order
steps: Open the Beginner course
Look through the first several lessons
Check whether the lesson sequence is fixed
tests.expected_result: The Beginner course shows its lessons in a fixed order.

tests.scenario: Return to the next beginner lesson
steps: Finish lesson 1 in the Beginner course
Leave the course screen
Open the Beginner course again
tests.expected_result: Lesson 1 is marked complete, and lesson 2 is shown as the next lesson.

tests.scenario: Set a daily reminder
steps: Open the reminder settings
Set the reminder time to 21:00 local time
Turn the reminder on and save it
tests.expected_result: The app saves the selected time and shows the reminder as enabled.

tests.scenario: Turn a daily reminder off
steps: Open reminder settings while a reminder is already enabled
Turn the reminder off
Save or exit settings
tests.expected_result: The reminder is shown as disabled, and no active daily reminder remains scheduled.

tests.scenario: Open the Sleep section
steps: Open the home screen
Go to the Sleep section
Look at the subsections shown there
tests.expected_result: Sleep meditations, sleep stories, and sleep sounds appear as separate sections.

tests.scenario: Open each sleep subsection
steps: Open the Sleep section
Open sleep meditations, then go back
Open sleep stories and sleep sounds
tests.expected_result: Each subsection opens its own list of sleep-related content.

tests.scenario: Let one sleep track roll into the next
steps: Open any two sleep tracks
Add both of them to the queue
Start the first track and let it finish
tests.expected_result: The second track starts automatically, and no blocking popup interrupts playback.

tests.scenario: Repeat a sleep track without interruption
steps: Open a sleep track
Turn on repeat
Let the track play until the end
tests.expected_result: The same track starts again automatically, and no blocking streak or completion popup appears between repeats.

tests.scenario: Keep playback going with the screen off
steps: Start any guided session
Connect wired or Bluetooth headphones
Turn the screen off and wait 10 minutes
tests.expected_result: The audio keeps playing for the full 10-minute window without the app crashing.

tests.scenario: Come back to the app after screen-off playback
steps: Start any guided session
Turn the screen off while keeping the headphones connected
Reopen the app after 10 minutes
tests.expected_result: The session is still active, the app has not crashed, and the playback controls still respond.

tests.scenario: See progress carry over to another device
steps: Sign in with the same account on device A and device B
Complete one course lesson on device A
Open the same course on device B and wait for sync
tests.expected_result: Within 60 seconds, device B shows the completed lesson and the updated streak count.

tests.scenario: Get progress back after signing in again
steps: Sign in to an account that already has a streak and completed lessons
Sign out and then sign back in with the same account
Open the progress or course screen and wait for sync
tests.expected_result: Within 60 seconds, the earlier streak count and completed lessons are restored.
